name: hpc-sync
description: Sync, build, run and monitor Slurm/Apptainer HPC workloads from VS Code over a single shared SSH session, with a visual job builder and a live cluster dashboard.

commands.title: HPC Sync: Mark Environment As Built (skip rebuild)
HPC Sync: Run Script on HPC…
HPC Sync: Launch on HPC (job builder)…

hpcSync.host.description: HPC login node hostname (e.g. rorqual.alliancecan.ca). Set at the USER level — it is your identity, not the project's.

hpcSync.user.description: Username on the HPC cluster. Set at the USER level.

hpcSync.allocGroup.description: Allocation / account group (e.g. rrg-pi). Used for project storage paths and sbatch account. Set at the USER level.

hpcSync.privateKeyPath.description: Path to an SSH private key (optional). The SSH agent is tried first; password auth is the fallback. 2FA prompts (Duo) are shown once per session and the connection is reused for all operations.

hpcSync.remoteProjectDir.description: Remote directory where scripts are rsync'd (bind/shell target). Supports ${workspaceName}. Override per project in .vscode/settings.json when a project has an established location.

hpcSync.remoteSifDir.description: Remote directory where the built .sif image is stored. Supports ${workspaceName}.

hpcSync.apptainerLoad.description: Command that puts apptainer in PATH on the HPC.

hpcSync.dockerImageName.description: Local Docker image to export on the slow path (run 'docker images' to find it). Set per project in .vscode/settings.json.

hpcSync.sifName.description: Filename of the Apptainer image built on the HPC. Supports ${workspaceName}.

hpcSync.tarName.description: Filename of the exported Docker tar. Supports ${workspaceName}.

hpcSync.dockerfilePath.description: Dockerfile watched for environment changes (relative to workspace root or absolute).

hpcSync.requirementsPath.description: Requirements file watched for environment changes (relative to workspace root or absolute).

hpcSync.outputDir.description: Value passed as --env OUTPUT_DIR when running workloads. Supports ${workspaceName}. Override per project.

hpcSync.containerWorkdir.description: Path the remote project dir is bound to inside the container. Supports ${workspaceName}.

hpcSync.jobsPollIntervalSeconds.description: How often the Slurm jobs view refreshes while connected.

hpcSync.recentJobsHours.description: How far back sacct looks for recently finished jobs.

hpcSync.excludes.description: Extra .gitignore-style patterns excluded from script sync (on top of .gitignore/.dockerignore). Set per project for large data caches that must never upload to the remote project dir.

hpcSync.confirmUploadOverMB.description: Ask for confirmation before a script sync uploads more than this many MB (guards against accidentally syncing large data files into home).

hpcSync.autoRebuildDevcontainer.description: When the extension changes the Dockerfile (mount ENV sync, scaffolding) while you are in a dev container: prompt to rebuild, rebuild automatically, or do nothing. Rebuilding restarts the container/window.

hpcSync.clusterPollIntervalSeconds.description: How often the Cluster view (storage quotas, node/CPU/GPU availability) refreshes while connected.
